game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
WEBFISHING a multiplayer chatroom-focused fishing game! Relax and fish (on the web!)

WEBFISHING is a multiplayer online casual fishing game where you relax, hang out, make friends, and catch fish!

CATCH THEM ALL!

Nearly 100 different creatures to catch- from the smallest snail to the biggest shark- you can catch it! Complete your journal, find rare fish, get loads of money, and get tons of special rewards!

UPGRADE AND CUSTOMIZE!

Become the ultimate fisherman! Upgrade your gear with new baits, lures, and rods- and collect tons of different cosmetics and props to show off your personality!

PLAY WITH FRIENDS!

WEBFISHING is designed around being social and hanging out with friends and strangers in the camp! Meet new people, find hidden spots, make awful fish puns, and catch fish together!

PLAY WITH TOYS!

Play REAL Guitar! Punch your friends! Draw with chalk! There's many tools and toys to play with in the sandbox of WEBFISHING!
game_info.description: Welcome to WEBFISHING! Cast your line into the tranquil waters and catch a variety of fish to complete your collection. Each fish you catch earns money that you can use to upgrade your fishing rod for better catches. Discover rare fish, fill your journal, and become the ultimate angler. Your goal is to catch all different fish species and achieve the highest fishing mastery level!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your character around the fishing spot
Space: Cast fishing line / Reel in when fish bites
Z: Open/Close fish journal to view your collection
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Test basic fishing mechanics and movement. Verifies that the player can move around the environment, cast the fishing line, and successfully catch fish when they bite.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move to a fishing spot near water, cast the line, wait for fish to bite, then reel in. Repeat the process multiple times to ensure consistent fishing mechanics work properly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully catches multiple fish, money increases with each catch, and the fishing rod can be cast and reeled repeatedly without errors. Position updates correctly with arrow key inputs.

TEST_1.expected: Player successfully catches multiple fish, money increases with each catch, and the fishing rod can be cast and reeled repeatedly without errors. Position updates correctly with arrow key inputs.

TEST_2.test_description: Test win condition by catching all fish species and reaching maximum mastery level. This validates the progression system and final win state.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Systematically fish in different locations, upgrade the rod when possible to catch rarer fish, and continue until all fish species are caught and maximum level is achieved.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state when all unique fish species are caught and player reaches the final mastery level. Journal shows complete fish collection.
TEST_2.description: Test win condition by catching all fish species and reaching maximum mastery level. This validates the progression system and final win state.

TEST_3.test_description: Test the upgrade system and economic progression. Validates that money is earned correctly and upgrades improve fishing capabilities.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Catch fish to earn money, purchase rod upgrades when affordable, and verify that upgraded rods allow catching of higher-tier fish that were previously unavailable.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Money accumulates correctly, upgrades are purchasable when player has sufficient funds, and upgraded equipment enables catching of rare fish species.
TEST_3.description: Test the upgrade system and economic progression. Validates that money is earned correctly and upgrades improve fishing capabilities.

TEST_4.test_description: Test journal system and fish collection tracking. Ensures that caught fish are properly recorded and displayed in the player's journal.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Catch various fish species, open the journal periodically to verify new catches are recorded, and check that duplicate catches don't create duplicate journal entries.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Journal accurately tracks all unique fish caught, displays fish information correctly, and shows progress toward complete collection.
TEST_4.description: Test journal system and fish collection tracking. Ensures that caught fish are properly recorded and displayed in the player's journal.
TEST_4.strategy: Catch various fish species, open the journal periodically to verify new catches are recorded, and check that duplicate catches don't create duplicate journal entries.
TEST_4.expected: Journal accurately tracks all unique fish caught, displays fish information correctly, and shows progress toward complete collection.

TEST_5.test_description: Test fishing in different water zones. Validates that different areas have different fish populations and rarity distributions.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Move to different water locations (shallow, deep, special spots) and fish in each area to verify zone-specific fish spawning.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Different zones yield different fish types, with some rare fish only appearing in specific locations, creating strategic location choices.
